articles.title: Learning cell dynamics with neural differential equations
articles.title_zh: 使用神经微分方程学习细胞动力学
articles.abstract: Nature Machine Intelligence, Published online: 18 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s42256-025-01150-3 Vinyard et al. present a generative method to model cell dynamics using neural stochastic differential equations that learn state-dependent drift and diffusion, outperforming existing approaches and enabling perturbation studies of development and disease.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然机器智能》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 18 日； doi:10.1038/s42256-025-01150-3 Vinyard 等人。提出了一种使用神经随机微分方程来模拟细胞动力学的生成方法，该方程可以学习状态相关的漂移和扩散，优于现有方法并能够对发育和疾病进行扰动研究。

articles.title: Optimal operation of hole spin qubits
articles.title_zh: 空穴自旋量子位的优化操作
articles.abstract: Nature Physics, Published online: 12 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41567-025-03106-1 Hole spin semiconductor qubits suffer from charge noise, but now it has been demonstrated that placing them in an appropriately oriented magnetic field can suppress this noise and improve qubit performance.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然物理学》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 12 日； doi:10.1038/s41567-025-03106-1 空穴自旋半导体量子位会受到电荷噪声的影响，但现在已经证明，将它们放置在适当定向的磁场中可以抑制这种噪声并提高量子位性能。

articles.title: A super-conducting diode with ultimate efficiency and noise resilience at 77 K
articles.title_zh: 77 K 下具有终极效率和噪声恢复能力的超导二极管
articles.abstract: Nature Physics, Published online: 11 December 2025; doi:10.1038/s41567-025-03118-x An electrical method is shown to reliably introduce nonreciprocal behaviour across a Josephson junction made of high-temperature cuprate superconductors, which then, under microwave irradiation, forms a ‘quantum superconducting diode’. The device is magnetic-field-free, works at a temperature of 77 K with a diode efficiency of 100%, and, owing to Shapiro steps that quantize the output voltage, has robust noise-filtering.
articles.abstract_zh: 《自然物理学》，在线发布：2025 年 12 月 11 日； doi:10.1038/s41567-025-03118-x 一种电气方法被证明可以在由高温铜酸盐超导体制成的约瑟夫森结上可靠地引入不可逆行为，然后在微波照射下形成“量子超导二极管”。该器件无磁场，工作温度为 77 K，二极管效率为 100%，并且由于夏皮罗步骤可量化输出电压，因此具有强大的噪声滤波器
